Healing Light  

Description

1: Increase Hitpoints by 620. Max: 801

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 238 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3.75 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 45 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your wounds heal.
Cast on other: Soandso 's wounds heal.

Game Description

Mends your target's wounds, healing between 620 and @1 hit points.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Healing Light

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Healing Light
ClassLevel
CLR45
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant

  • Sold By (8)

If i wanted to know what the stats on a spell are i'd look them up. We all know CH best cast for the mana.. tell the chanter with 2k hp to wait 10 seconds for CH as he/she getting wacked...we all come here to find out if the spell is live.. and where it can be gotten. if you'r on a test server stay on your test server and out of posts..
▲ Page top
Better?
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2005 at 11:48 PM Rating: Decent
ChantressClio
Scholar
171 posts
Complete heal does 7500 hp for 400 mana cost.
This does 900 hp for 250 mana cost.

Better than CHEAL? No.
But its less mana to cost, and i dunno, but the agro is prolly less than CHEAL, which is Agro City, USA. And the cast time is one third that of CHEAL's 10 seconds.
▲ Page top
RE: Better?
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2005 at 2:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752538177
View User Forum
186 posts
Complete heal isn't necessarily aggro city. All that matters is the number of hit points that you heal a PC that an NPC has at least 1 point of hate towards (i.e., agro). For instance, if I CH somebody who's down 20 HPs, I'm not going to get much agro.

Obviously, "patch" heals and CH all have their place. This is a patch heal or a heal that's more mana effective on somebody missing more than 630 HPs (where superior would otherwise be more mana effective), but less than 1440 (where CH is more mana effective). Also remember that it wont heal for 900 as clerics get a 5% bonus to all heals, so it will heal for 945.
▲ Page top
